questions.question: What is the difference between FIRST and FOLLOW sets?
expectedPoints: FIRST contains starting terminals of derivations
FOLLOW contains terminals that can appear after non-terminals
FIRST can contain ε, FOLLOW cannot
FIRST is defined for all symbols, FOLLOW only for non-terminals

questions.question: Explain the process of computing FIRST and FOLLOW sets for a given grammar with examples.
expectedPoints: Initialize FIRST sets with terminal values
Initialize FOLLOW with $ for start symbol
Apply production rules to propagate FOLLOW
